release_notes:
## What's New

- Manage imported data from a full list view (filter, edit, delete).
- Import Excel (.xlsx) files and download CSV/XLSX templates.
- PDF report export includes an expanded chart catalogue.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed a startup back-navigation race that could leave a stuck loading screen.
- Fixed Android log export save location.
- Optional import event counts remain nullable; XLSX integer parsing improved.
